trust_scale.label: mortal enemy
trust_scale.description: Greatest desire is to harm or destroy.

trust_scale.label: enemy
trust_scale.description: Actively seeks to harm or destroy.

trust_scale.label: adversary
trust_scale.description: Distrustful and likely to resist or sabotage.

trust_scale.label: deep bond
trust_scale.romantic_interest: interested and very attracted, will actively pursue a relationship

trust_scale.label: unshakable bond
trust_scale.romantic_interest: adulation, will pursue any potential relationship

trust_scale.label: worship
trust_scale.romantic_interest: Will do literally anything for a hint of affection
trust_scale.description: Will believe or go alonge with literally anything.

mood_scale.label: cold / obstructive
mood_scale.description: Guarded, withholding, and likely to resist cooperation.

mood_scale.label: helpful / cooperative / somewhat good mood
mood_scale.description: Willing to cooperate within reasonable limits or cheerful.

mood_scale.label: satisfied / protective / protected / good mood
mood_scale.description: Protective, proactive, and happy with the situtation.

mood_scale.label: happy / fulfilled / content
mood_scale.description: Protective, proactive, and very happy with the situtation.
